decisions.decision: 6 plans in 2 waves — Wave 1 all parallel, Wave 2 runs full suite
decisions.rationale: All resource groups follow records.py pattern independently; Wave 2 gates on all Wave 1 completing for full integration test

decisions.decision: ATTR-04: archive not delete on attributes
decisions.rationale: Attio API supports archive, not hard delete — enforced with grep AC and dedicated test

decisions.decision: ENTRY-06/07: assert command + PATCH/PUT via --overwrite flag

context_notes: Phase 1 is fully shipped (87+ tests, 6 plans committed). Phase 2 planning is complete — 6 plans, 57 requirements, verified clean by gsd-plan-checker. All plans are in .planning/phases/02-full-api-coverage/. This is pure pattern repetition on records.py — no new architecture. Wave 1 (plans 02-01 through 02-05) runs in parallel. Wave 2 (plan 02-06) runs the full integration test suite after all Wave 1 plans complete.
